message:
fix(security): harden GitHub Actions workflows against script injection

Move all ${{ }} expression interpolations out of inline `run:` blocks
and into `env:` blocks across both checksum-monitor.yml and
installer-notification-receiver.yml. This prevents a class of script
injection attacks where a malicious actor could craft a payload (e.g.
via repository_dispatch client_payload fields) containing shell
metacharacters that would be interpreted by bash when the expression
is interpolated directly into a `run:` script.

checksum-monitor.yml:
- Move PAYLOAD, TRUSTED_CHANGED, EXTERNAL_CHANGED, DRIFT_DETECTED,
  INTERNAL_DRIFTED, MISMATCHES, ERRORS, SKIPPED, VERIFY_CHANGED,
  VERIFY_OUTCOME, and COMMIT_COMMITTED to env blocks
- Add explicit failure reporting when verify step outcome != success,
  so failed verification is surfaced in the summary instead of silently
  appearing as "no changes"

installer-notification-receiver.yml:
- Move INPUT_TOOL, PAYLOAD_TOOL, PAYLOAD_ACTION, PAYLOAD_NEW_SHA256,
  PAYLOAD_OLD_SHA256, PAYLOAD_REPO, PAYLOAD_COMMIT, PAYLOAD_URL,
  INSTALLER_URL, TOOL_NAME, COMPUTED_SHA, EVENT_TYPE, SOURCE_REPO,
  SOURCE_COMMIT, BRANCH_NAME, PR_BODY, OLD_SHA, NEW_SHA, WARNINGS,
  and RUN_ID to env blocks
- Add validation for event_type against an allowlist of known values
- Add format validation for SOURCE_REPO (owner/repo pattern) and
  SOURCE_COMMIT (hex SHA pattern) to reject malformed dispatch payloads
- Switch yq expressions from `.installers.$TOOL_NAME` to bracket
  notation `.installers["$TOOL_NAME"]` so tool names with special
  characters (hyphens, dots) are handled correctly
- Add HTTPS-only enforcement and empty-URL rejection for installer URLs
- Replace fragile `sed` URL host extraction with `awk/cut` and add
  null-host guard
- Replace hand-crafted JSON audit log entry with `jq -nc` to ensure
  valid JSON output regardless of field contents
- Fix removal PR body template: switch from PREOF heredoc + sed
  variable substitution to a regular EOF heredoc that expands variables
  directly, eliminating the two extra sed calls
- Remove unreliable `npm test || echo` fallback in the test step;
  YAML validation via `yq e '.'` is the actual gate
- Quote $CHECKSUMS_FILE and $GITHUB_OUTPUT consistently

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,9 +36,11 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Log repository dispatch payload
         if: github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch'
+        env:
+          PAYLOAD: ${{ toJson(github.event.client_payload) }}
         run: |
           echo "Repository dispatch payload:"
-          echo '${{ toJson(github.event.client_payload) }}'
+          echo "$PAYLOAD"
 
       - name: Configure git identity
         run: |
@@ -192,6 +194,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Commit and push updates
         if: steps.verify.outputs.changed == 'true'
         id: commit
+        env:
+          TRUSTED_CHANGED: ${{ steps.verify.outputs.trusted_changed || 'none' }}
+          EXTERNAL_CHANGED: ${{ steps.verify.outputs.external_changed || 'none' }}
         run: |
           # Check if checksums.yaml actually changed (handles race condition)
           if git diff --quiet checksums.yaml; then
@@ -208,8 +213,8 @@ jobs:
             -m "Updated checksums for upstream installer scripts that have changed." \
             -m "" \
             -m "Changed tools: ${CHANGED_TOOLS}" \
-            -m "Trusted: ${{ steps.verify.outputs.trusted_changed || 'none' }}" \
-            -m "External: ${{ steps.verify.outputs.external_changed || 'none' }}" \
+            -m "Trusted: $TRUSTED_CHANGED" \
+            -m "External: $EXTERNAL_CHANGED" \

@@ -288,27 +293,40 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Summary
         if: always()
+        env:
+          DRIFT_DETECTED: ${{ steps.drift.outputs.drift_detected || 'false' }}
+          INTERNAL_DRIFTED: ${{ steps.drift.outputs.internal_drifted || 0 }}
+          MISMATCHES: ${{ steps.verify.outputs.mismatches || 0 }}
+          ERRORS: ${{ steps.verify.outputs.errors || 0 }}
+          SKIPPED: ${{ steps.verify.outputs.skipped || 0 }}
+          TRUSTED_CHANGED: ${{ steps.verify.outputs.trusted_changed || 'none' }}
+          EXTERNAL_CHANGED: ${{ steps.verify.outputs.external_changed || 'none' }}
+          VERIFY_CHANGED: ${{ steps.verify.outputs.changed }}
+          VERIFY_OUTCOME: ${{ steps.verify.outcome }}
+          COMMIT_COMMITTED: ${{ steps.commit.outputs.committed }}
         run: |
           echo "## Checksum Auto-Update Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "| Metric | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "|--------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "| Total Checked | $(jq '.total // 0' current.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0) |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Manifest/Internal Drift | ${{ steps.drift.outputs.drift_detected || 'false' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Internal Drifted Files | ${{ steps.drift.outputs.internal_drifted || 0 }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Mismatches | ${{ steps.verify.outputs.mismatches || 0 }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Errors | ${{ steps.verify.outputs.errors || 0 }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Skipped | ${{ steps.verify.outputs.skipped || 0 }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Trusted Changed | ${{ steps.verify.outputs.trusted_changed || 'none' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| External Changed | ${{ steps.verify.outputs.external_changed || 'none' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Manifest/Internal Drift | $DRIFT_DETECTED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Internal Drifted Files | $INTERNAL_DRIFTED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Mismatches | $MISMATCHES |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Errors | $ERRORS |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Skipped | $SKIPPED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Trusted Changed | $TRUSTED_CHANGED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| External Changed | $EXTERNAL_CHANGED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
-          if [[ "${{ steps.drift.outputs.drift_detected }}" == "true" ]]; then
+          if [[ "$DRIFT_DETECTED" == "true" ]]; then
             echo "✅ **Generated artifact drift detected and auto-fixed**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi
 
-          if [[ "${{ steps.verify.outputs.changed }}" == "true" ]]; then
-            if [[ "${{ steps.commit.outputs.committed }}" == "true" ]]; then
+          if [[ "$VERIFY_OUTCOME" != "success" ]]; then
+            echo "❌ **Checksum verification failed; no automatic update was applied**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          elif [[ "$VERIFY_CHANGED" == "true" ]]; then
+            if [[ "$COMMIT_COMMITTED" == "true" ]]; then
               echo "✅ **Checksums automatically updated and committed to main**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
             else
               echo "⚠️ **Changes detected but commit skipped (race condition or conflict)**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

@@ -58,61 +58,109 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Validate payload and extract fields
         id: validate
+        env:
+          INPUT_TOOL: ${{ github.event.inputs.tool_name }}
+          PAYLOAD_TOOL: ${{ github.event.client_payload.tool }}
+          PAYLOAD_ACTION: ${{ github.event.action }}
+          PAYLOAD_NEW_SHA256: ${{ github.event.client_payload.new_sha256 }}
+          PAYLOAD_OLD_SHA256: ${{ github.event.client_payload.old_sha256 }}
+          PAYLOAD_REPO: ${{ github.event.client_payload.repo }}
+          PAYLOAD_COMMIT: ${{ github.event.client_payload.commit }}
+          PAYLOAD_URL: ${{ github.event.client_payload.url }}
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
 
           echo "::group::Payload Validation"
 
           # Determine event source
           if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "workflow_dispatch" ]]; then
-            TOOL_NAME="${{ github.event.inputs.tool_name }}"
+            TOOL_NAME="$INPUT_TOOL"
             EVENT_TYPE="manual-verify"
             NEW_SHA256=""
             OLD_SHA256=""
             SOURCE_REPO="manual"
             SOURCE_COMMIT="manual"
           else
             # Extract from repository_dispatch payload
-            TOOL_NAME="${{ github.event.client_payload.tool }}"
-            EVENT_TYPE="${{ github.event.action }}"
-            NEW_SHA256="${{ github.event.client_payload.new_sha256 }}"
-            OLD_SHA256="${{ github.event.client_payload.old_sha256 }}"
-            SOURCE_REPO="${{ github.event.client_payload.repo }}"
-            SOURCE_COMMIT="${{ github.event.client_payload.commit }}"
+            TOOL_NAME="$PAYLOAD_TOOL"
+            EVENT_TYPE="$PAYLOAD_ACTION"
+            NEW_SHA256="$PAYLOAD_NEW_SHA256"
+            OLD_SHA256="$PAYLOAD_OLD_SHA256"
+            SOURCE_REPO="$PAYLOAD_REPO"
+            SOURCE_COMMIT="$PAYLOAD_COMMIT"
           fi
 
           echo "Tool: $TOOL_NAME"
           echo "Event: $EVENT_TYPE"
           echo "Source: $SOURCE_REPO @ $SOURCE_COMMIT"
 
+          # Validate event type
+          if ! [[ "$EVENT_TYPE" =~ ^(installer-updated|installer-removed|installer-added|manual-verify)$ ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Invalid event type: $EVENT_TYPE"
+            echo "is_valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            exit 0
+          fi
+
           # Validate tool name format (alphanumeric, underscore, hyphen only)
           if ! [[ "$TOOL_NAME" =~ ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$ ]]; then
             echo "::error::Invalid tool name format: $TOOL_NAME"
-            echo "is_valid=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+            echo "is_valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
             exit 0
           fi
 
+          # Validate dispatch provenance fields when event came from repository_dispatch
+          if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" != "workflow_dispatch" ]]; then
+            if ! [[ "$SOURCE_REPO" =~ ^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+/[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$ ]]; then
+              echo "::error::Invalid source repository format: $SOURCE_REPO"
+              echo "is_valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+              exit 0
+            fi
+            if [[ -n "$SOURCE_COMMIT" ]] && ! [[ "$SOURCE_COMMIT" =~ ^[0-9a-fA-F]{7,40}$ ]]; then
+              echo "::error::Invalid source commit SHA: $SOURCE_COMMIT"
+              echo "is_valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+              exit 0
+            fi
+            SOURCE_COMMIT="${SOURCE_COMMIT:-unknown}"
+          fi
+
           # Check if tool exists in checksums.yaml (for update/remove)
           if [[ "$EVENT_TYPE" != "installer-added" ]]; then
-            if ! yq e ".installers.$TOOL_NAME" $CHECKSUMS_FILE | grep -q "url:"; then
+            if [[ "$(yq e ".installers[\"$TOOL_NAME\"].url // \"\"" "$CHECKSUMS_FILE")" == "" ]]; then
               echo "::error::Unknown tool: $TOOL_NAME (not in checksums.yaml)"
-              echo "is_valid=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+              echo "is_valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
               exit 0
             fi
           fi
 
           # Get URL from checksums.yaml (or from payload for new tools)
           if [[ "$EVENT_TYPE" == "installer-added" ]]; then
-            INSTALLER_URL="${{ github.event.client_payload.url }}"
+            INSTALLER_URL="$PAYLOAD_URL"
           else
-            INSTALLER_URL=$(yq e ".installers.$TOOL_NAME.url" $CHECKSUMS_FILE)
+            INSTALLER_URL=$(yq e ".installers[\"$TOOL_NAME\"].url // \"\"" "$CHECKSUMS_FILE")
+          fi
+
+          if [[ -z "$INSTALLER_URL" || "$INSTALLER_URL" == "null" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Installer URL is missing for $TOOL_NAME"
+            echo "is_valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            exit 0
+          fi
+
+          if ! [[ "$INSTALLER_URL" =~ ^https:// ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Installer URL must use HTTPS: $INSTALLER_URL"
+            echo "is_valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            exit 0
           fi
 
           echo "URL: $INSTALLER_URL"
 
           # Validate URL is from trusted domain
           TRUSTED_DOMAINS="github.com githubusercontent.com raw.githubusercontent.com claude.ai astral.sh bun.sh setup.atuin.sh sh.rustup.rs jeffreysprompts.com"
-          URL_HOST=$(echo "$INSTALLER_URL" | sed -E 's|^https?://([^/]+)/.*|\1|')
+          URL_HOST=$(printf '%s\n' "$INSTALLER_URL" | awk -F/ '{print $3}' | cut -d: -f1)
+          if [[ -z "$URL_HOST" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Could not parse URL host from: $INSTALLER_URL"
+            echo "is_valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            exit 0
+          fi
 
           IS_TRUSTED=false
           for domain in $TRUSTED_DOMAINS; do
@@ -124,7 +172,7 @@ jobs:
 
           if [[ "$IS_TRUSTED" != "true" ]]; then
             echo "::error::Untrusted URL domain: $URL_HOST"
-            echo "is_valid=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+            echo "is_valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
             exit 0
           fi
 
@@ -142,17 +190,32 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Append to audit log
         if: always()
+        env:
+          EVENT_TYPE: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.event_type || '' }}
+          TOOL_NAME: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.tool_name || '' }}
+          SOURCE_REPO: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.source_repo || '' }}
+          SOURCE_COMMIT: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.source_commit || '' }}
+          IS_VALID: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.is_valid || 'false' }}
+          RUN_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
         run: |
           mkdir -p .github/audit
-          echo '{
-            "timestamp": "'$(date -Iseconds)'",
-            "event_type": "${{ steps.validate.outputs.event_type }}",
-            "tool": "${{ steps.validate.outputs.tool_name }}",
-            "source_repo": "${{ steps.validate.outputs.source_repo }}",
-            "source_commit": "${{ steps.validate.outputs.source_commit }}",
-            "is_valid": ${{ steps.validate.outputs.is_valid }},
-            "workflow_run": "${{ github.run_id }}"
-          }' >> $AUDIT_LOG_FILE
+          jq -nc \
+            --arg timestamp "$(date -Iseconds)" \
+            --arg event_type "$EVENT_TYPE" \
+            --arg tool "$TOOL_NAME" \
+            --arg source_repo "$SOURCE_REPO" \
+            --arg source_commit "$SOURCE_COMMIT" \
+            --arg run_id "$RUN_ID" \
+            --arg is_valid "$IS_VALID" \
+            '{
+              timestamp: $timestamp,
+              event_type: $event_type,
+              tool: $tool,
+              source_repo: $source_repo,
+              source_commit: $source_commit,
+              is_valid: ($is_valid == "true"),
+              workflow_run: $run_id
+            }' >> "$AUDIT_LOG_FILE"
 
   verify-checksum:
     needs: validate-dispatch
@@ -172,12 +235,12 @@ jobs:

         id: compute

         run: |
           set -euo pipefail

-

@@ -193,12 +256,12 @@ jobs:

         id: compare
+        env:

+          CURRENT=$(yq e ".installers[\"$TOOL_NAME\"].sha256 // \"none\"" "$CHECKSUMS_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "none")
 
           echo "Current: $CURRENT"
           echo "Computed: $COMPUTED"
@@ -222,9 +285,11 @@ jobs:
       scan_warnings: ${{ steps.scan.outputs.warnings }}
     steps:
       - name: Download installer for scanning

+          INSTALLER_URL: ${{ needs.validate-dispatch.outputs.installer_url }}
         run: |
           curl -fsSL --max-time 60 \
-            -o /tmp/installer.sh "${{ needs.validate-dispatch.outputs.installer_url }}"
+            -o /tmp/installer.sh "$INSTALLER_URL"
 
       - name: Security scan
         id: scan
@@ -309,55 +374,51 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Create branch
         id: branch
+        env:
+          TOOL_NAME: ${{ needs.validate-dispatch.outputs.tool_name }}
+          COMPUTED_SHA: ${{ needs.verify-checksum.outputs.computed_sha256 }}

+          SHORT_SHA=${COMPUTED_SHA:0:8}
 
           BRANCH_NAME="auto/update-${TOOL_NAME}-checksum-${SHORT_SHA}"

           git checkout -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
 
       - name: Update checksums.yaml
+        env:
+          TOOL_NAME: ${{ needs.validate-dispatch.outputs.tool_name }}

+          EVENT_TYPE: ${{ needs.validate-dispatch.outputs.event_type }}

         run: |
-          TOOL_NAME="${{ needs.validate-dispatch.outputs.tool_name }}"
-          NEW_SHA256="${{ needs.verify-checksum.outputs.computed_sha256 }}"
-          EVENT_TYPE="${{ needs.validate-dispatch.outputs.event_type }}"

             # Add new entry
-            INSTALLER_URL="${{ needs.validate-dispatch.outputs.installer_url }}"
-            yq e -i ".installers.$TOOL_NAME.url = \"$INSTALLER_URL\"" $CHECKSUMS_FILE
-            yq e -i ".installers.$TOOL_NAME.sha256 = \"$NEW_SHA256\"" $CHECKSUMS_FILE
+            yq e -i ".installers[\"$TOOL_NAME\"].url = \"$INSTALLER_URL\"" "$CHECKSUMS_FILE"

           else

-            yq e -i ".installers.$TOOL_NAME.sha256 = \"$NEW_SHA256\"" $CHECKSUMS_FILE
+            yq e -i ".installers[\"$TOOL_NAME\"].sha256 = \"$NEW_SHA256\"" "$CHECKSUMS_FILE"

-
